title: Investor Relations
note: Investor relations overview confirming M&T's corporate background, stock listing, ticker, current reports, and investor materials.

title: M&T Bank Corporation 2025 Form 10-K
note: Primary source for 2025 assets, office footprint, subsidiaries, services, profitability, capital, and banking risk context.

title: Commercial Banking Products & Services
note: Product page describing M&T commercial banking coverage, deposits, financing, treasury management, merchant services, commercial cards, and real estate lending.

title: Treasury Management Services
note: Product page describing M&T receivables, payables, fraud and risk management, deposit and liquidity management, and Treasury Center features.

title: Mobile Banking
note: Product page describing M&T Mobile Banking app capabilities including Zelle, bill pay, mobile check deposit, digital wallet, Money Smart, card management, eStatements, and alerts.

title: M&T Bank Market Capitalization
note: Market-data source for M&T Bank's current market capitalization, share price, and CompaniesMarketCap ranking context.

title: M&T Bank P/E Ratio
note: Market-data source for M&T Bank's trailing price-to-earnings ratio.

title: Apache Fineract
note: Open-source core banking platform used as a plausible banking-ledger and financial-services infrastructure alternative.

title: Open Bank Project
note: Open-source open-banking API platform relevant to account access, payments, bank-as-a-platform integrations, and portability concepts.

title: BTCPay Server
note: Self-hosted open-source Bitcoin payment processor used as an enabler for direct merchant invoicing and settlement concepts.

title: How Fedimint Works
note: Explains Fedimint community custody, e-cash notes, private transfers, guardian visibility, and Lightning interoperability.

title: Fedimint Getting Started
note: Documentation describing Fedimint as a modular open-source protocol for community Bitcoin custody and transactions.

title: Breez SDK - Spark
note: Technical documentation for integrating instant, non-custodial Bitcoin payments using Lightning and Spark in apps and services.
